ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist performing the track */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for the track in the music service */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness level of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (major/minor) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "chorus_hit" REAL /* Chorus hit point in seconds */,
  "sections" INTEGER /* Number of sections in the track */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable for prediction */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI for the artist in the music service */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the track */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement event */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., listener, curator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being analyzed */,
  "danceability_avg" REAL /* Average danceability score */,
  "energy_avg" REAL /* Average energy score */,
  "tempo_avg" REAL /* Average tempo */,
  "popularity_avg" REAL /* Average popularity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_analysis_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric record */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded engagement metrics */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Count of plays on the date */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Count of likes on the date */,
  "skips" INTEGER /* Count of skips on the date */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Count of shares on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the API call */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint being accessed */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the response */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ab_test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group (control or treatment) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborative_filters" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_based_filters" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature of the track (e.g., genre, mood) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "feature")
)

CREATE TABLE "hybrid_filters" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user to the track */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature of the track (e.g., genre, mood) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "track_id")
)
